title: Vectorized Addition
description: Perform element-wise addition on two vectors of the same length.
problemStatement:
Power through data! Given `x <- c(1, 2, 3)` and `y <- c(10, 20, 30)`, add them together using the `+` operator. Print the result.

**Requirement:** Observe how R adds them element-by-element without a loop.
hints: R's operators are 'vectorized', meaning they apply to whole collections at once.
